data.title: Brazil Proposes Cryptocurrency to Seize BRICS Opportunities
data.description:
Brazil Proposes Cryptocurrency for BRICS trade, prioritizing blockchain-based solutions to enhance financial transactions without replacing the U.S. dollar.
source: https://coincu.com/326602-brazil-proposes-cryptocurrency-for-brics-trade

data.title: 'Very possible' Bitcoin consolidates for 8 months again: 10x Research
data.description:
10x Research’s head crypto researcher isn’t ruling out Bitcoin repeating its 2024 price action, where it spent much of the year consolidating after hitting all-time highs early on.“Very possible,” Markus Thielen told Cointelegraph when asked what the chances of Bitcoin (BTC) repeating a similar market movement to 2024, where it reached an all-time high of $73,679 in March before entering a...
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/bitcoin-consolidation-phase-repeat-2024-price-action-possible-crypto-analyst?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Ethereum's Progress Hindered by Lack of Vision, Says Former Engineer
data.description: According to PANews, former Ethereum Foundation engineer Hari has expressed concerns about the lack of a clear and cohesive vision for Ethereum and its Ethereum Virtual Machine (EVM). Hari believes this absence of direction is hindering EVM's progress. He suggests that Ethereum requires more decisive leadership to avoid stagnation. Furthermore, Hari emphasizes the need for Ethereum to shift its focus from research to delivery. He urges the platform to reflect on the past five years to identify and address issues. Without changes in its operational approach, Ethereum risks repeating the same outcomes.

data.title: Marc Lasry Highlights Uncertainty in Trump's Tariff Policies
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Marc Lasry, co-founder of Avenue Capital Group and billionaire investor, has expressed concerns over the uncertainty surrounding U.S. President Donald Trump's policies, particularly regarding tariffs. Lasry noted that such unpredictability poses challenges for investors looking to capitalize on market opportunities. Speaking at a credit opportunities workshop at New York University, the 65-year-old investor stated, "When the market doesn't know what to do, that's a problem." He further explained that under these circumstances, an economy cannot remain unaffected, which could lead to a slowdown and potentially push the economy into a recession.

data.title: U.S. Senate Approves Republican Spending Bill to Prevent Government Shutdown
data.description: According to BlockBeats, the U.S. Senate has passed a Republican spending bill with a 62-38 vote, effectively eliminating the risk of a government shutdown. The legislation, which includes no additional restrictions, supports the streamlined government plan led by Elon Musk and ensures funding for federal operations until the end of the fiscal year on September 30. This development marks a significant step in maintaining government functionality and advancing administrative efficiency.

data.title: Former Ethereum Foundation engineer: Ethereum and EVM lack a clear vision and need to replace decisive leaders
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Harikrishnan Mulackal, a former Solidity expert and compiler engineer at the Ethereum Foundation, warned that Ethereum and the Ethereum Virtual Machine (EVM) currently lack a clear and cohesive development vision, resulting in stagnant technological progress.
Mulackal believes that Ethereum needs more decisive leadership, otherwise it may eventually fall into a state of "rigidity-no longer changing". He suggested reducing the focus on research and focusing on product delivery, and proposed that Ethereum should regularly perform hard fork updates to promote technological iteration. In addition, he emphasized that the Ethereum community should seriously reflect on the bottlenecks of development in the past five years and take measures to improve them, otherwise the existing way of operation will continue to bring the same results.
At the same time, the Ethereum Foundation has continued to sell ETH recently, and the price of ETH is relatively weak, which may further affect the development of its ecology.

data.title: Meme coin’s market capitalization hit a high of 9% in November 2024 and then fell back to 5.67%
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Ella Zhang, director of YZi Labs, shared a set of data on the changing trend of the market value ratio of Meme coins to non-Mem coins: After experiencing drastic fluctuations, the market value of Meme coins rose from 2.5% in February 2024 to 5% in March, and reached a peak of 9% in November 2024. However, since January 2025, the ratio has begun to decline, and it has fallen back to 5.67% in February.
Data shows that the Meme coin market expanded rapidly in the second half of 2024, and its market value reached US$111 billion in November 2024, accounting for 9% of the non-Mem coin market. However, as market sentiment cooled, the ratio fell back to 7.5% in early 2025, and further fell to 5.67% in February.
The analysis pointed out that in the long run, the market will still focus on fundamental construction rather than short-term speculation, and the real long-term builders will eventually win.

data.title: Lockbit Ransomware Developer Extradited to the U.S. for Trial
data.description:
According to Odaily, Rostislav Panev, a developer for the Lockbit ransomware, has been extradited to the United States and is currently in custody awaiting trial. The U.S. Department of Justice accuses Panev of working as a programmer for the ransomware since 2022 and receiving approximately $230,000 in cryptocurrency transactions. With servers being seized and associates pleading guilty, Lockbit may face further setbacks. However, key figures like Dmitry Khoroshev remain at large.

Previously, Russian national Ruslan Magomedovich Astamirov and dual Canadian-Russian citizen Mikhail Vasiliev were identified as members of the Lockbit organization. They were arrested in 2023 and 2022, respectively, and could face maximum sentences of 25 and 45 years in prison.

data.title: Lockbit ransomware developer Rostislav Panev has been extradited to the United States
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Lockbit ransomware developer Rostislav Panev has been extradited to the United States and is currently in custody and awaiting trial. According to the charges of the U.S. Department of Justice, he has been a programmer of the software since 2022 and has accepted cryptocurrency transfers worth about $230,000. With the seizure of the server and the confession of the related parties, Lockbit may be further hit, but the leader of the organization, Dmitry Khoroshev and other key figures are still at large. (News.bitcoin) 
Previously, Russian citizen Ruslan Magomedovich Astamirov and Mikhail Vasiliev, who has dual Canadian and Russian citizenship, have also been identified as members of the Lockbit organization. They were arrested in 2023 and 2022 and may face up to 25 and 45 years in prison, respectively.

data.title: Elon Musk’s SpaceX urges the US govt. to take action on Starlink’s trade barriers
data.description:
Elon Musk’s SpaceX is pushing the US to address the trade barriers faced by Starlink’s satellite communication service in foreign countries. The company argues that its competitors from foreign countries have no such import restrictions in the United States.  According to a Reuters report, SpaceX sent a letter to the US Trade Representative Office on […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/elon-musks-spacex-calls-for-action/
